email.sentHint: Emails sent from this mailbox will appear here

webhook.webhookDesc: Notify a specified URL when new emails are received
webhook.sendTestMessage: Send test message to this Webhook
webhook.webhookPostDesc: We will send a POST request to this URL with new email information
webhook.testSuccessDesc: Webhook call succeeded, please check if the target server received the request
webhook.testFailedDesc: Please check if the URL is correct and accessible
webhook.docsHeader: When a new email is received, we send a POST request to the configured URL with headers:

websiteConfig.allowRegisterDesc: When disabled, /api/auth/register will reject new registrations
websiteConfig.pollConfigDesc: Set the auto-refresh interval for the email list (milliseconds)
websiteConfig.prefixConfigDesc: When no prefix is provided, the system will auto-generate one based on these settings

emailService.enableResendDesc: When enabled, emails will be sent via Resend
emailService.emperorRule: Emperor - Can send unlimited emails without any restrictions

apiKey.saveWarning: Save this key now — it will only be shown once and cannot be recovered
apiKey.namePlaceholder: Give your API Key a name
apiKey.fetchListFailed: Failed to fetch API Keys list
apiKey.updateStatusFailed: Failed to update API Key status
apiKey.noPermission: Duke or higher role required to manage API Keys
apiKey.contactAdmin: Please contact the site administrator to upgrade your role
apiKey.noApiKeysHint: Click the "Create API Key" button above to create your first API Key
apiKey.apiNote: Note: All requests must include the X-API-Key header

cardKey.generateDesc: Generate card keys for specified email addresses, one per line
cardKey.enterAtLeastOne: Please enter at least one email address
cardKey.noCardKeysHint: Click the "Generate Keys" button to create new card keys
cardKey.dialogDesc: Select card key type and fill in the details. Generated keys can be used to create temp accounts
cardKey.singleModeDesc: One card key binds to one fixed email address
cardKey.multiModeDesc: One card key binds to multiple fixed email addresses
cardKey.singleModeTip: Single mode: After login with the card key, user can only use one preset email address, suitable for single user
cardKey.multiModeTip: Multi mode: One card key binds to multiple preset email addresses, user can only use these emails after login, suitable for batch allocation
cardKey.singleEmailHint: One email per line, each email will generate an independent card key
cardKey.multiEmailHint: One email per line, all emails will be bound to the same card key
cardKey.multiCardKeyTip: One card key will bind all the above email addresses, user can only use these emails after login
cardKey.expiryHint: Set the account validity period after card key activation
cardKey.searchPlaceholder: Search card key code, email or user...
cardKey.resetSuccess: Card key has been reset and can be used again
cardKey.confirmDeleteBatch: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected card keys?
cardKey.confirmDeleteSingle: Are you sure you want to delete this card key?
cardKey.confirmDeleteWarning: This will also delete associated temp users and all their data. This cannot be undone.
cardKey.invalidDomains: The following email domains are not in the allowed list: {emails}
cardKey.selectToDelete: Please select card keys to delete first

domain.emptyHint: Click to add domains, supports pasting multiple
domain.countHint: Added {count} domains, click × on a tag to remove

cleanup.title: Cleanup & Expiry Policy
cleanup.autoCleanupDesc1: Cleanup tasks are triggered by Cloudflare Scheduled Triggers (usually every 24 hours), or can be manually called via /api/cleanup/temp-accounts.
cleanup.autoCleanupDesc2: Turning off a toggle will stop automatic cleanup of the corresponding resources.
cleanup.autoCleanupDesc3: "Cleanup expired mailboxes" will cascade delete all messages under that mailbox — use with caution.
cleanup.autoCleanupDesc4: Card key expiry rules are affected by both the default validity and custom parameters set during creation.
cleanup.deleteUsedExpiredDesc: Expired and used card keys will also clean up associated temp accounts/users and their data.
cleanup.deleteUnusedExpiredDesc: Only deletes expired and unused card keys; no user data is affected.
cleanup.deleteExpiredEmailsDesc: Deletes expired records from the emails table, cascading to delete messages under the mailbox.

shared.selectMessage: Select an email to view details
shared.linkExpiredDesc: This share link has expired and is no longer accessible.
shared.linkNotFoundDesc: This share link does not exist or has been deleted.
shared.linkMayExpired: The share link may have exceeded its validity period
shared.contactOwner: Please contact the sharer to create a new share link
shared.checkLink: Please check if the link is complete
shared.linkMayDeleted: The share link may have been deleted
shared.refreshHint: This page does not auto-refresh. After requesting a verification code, click the refresh button or reload the page to see new emails.

admin.noPermission: You don't have permission to access this page
